verse.verse_0: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.
verse.verse_1: By the sun and its brightness
verse.verse_2: And [by] the moon when it follows it
verse.verse_3: And [by] the day when it displays it
verse.verse_4: And [by] the night when it covers it
verse.verse_5: And [by] the sky and He who constructed it
verse.verse_6: And [by] the earth and He who spread it
verse.verse_7: And [by] the soul and He who proportioned it
verse.verse_8: And inspired it [with discernment of] its wickedness and its righteousness,
verse.verse_9: He has succeeded who purifies it,
verse.verse_10: And he has failed who instills it [with corruption].
verse.verse_11: Thamud denied [their prophet] by reason of their transgression,
verse.verse_12: When the most wretched of them was sent forth.
verse.verse_13: And the messenger of Allah [Salih] said to them, "[Do not harm] the she-camel of Allah or [prevent her from] her drink."
verse.verse_14: But they denied him and hamstrung her. So their Lord brought down upon them destruction for their sin and made it equal [upon all of them].
verse.verse_15: And He does not fear the consequence thereof.
